title: 7 Herbal Creams For Bladder Pain
description: Calendula officinalis creams contains triterpenoid saponins, flavonoids, and carotenoids, which are responsible for its anti-inflammatory and soothing properties. These compounds help reduce swelling and ease pain in the bladder area. The anti-inflammatory properties of triterpenoid saponins and flavonoids work to calm the inflammation and irritation that can cause bladder pain. Additionally, carotenoids have antioxidant properties that can help protect the bladder lining from damage a...
